Name: Unconfirmed

Very Wild Night [Instrumental]
[prod. WondaGurl & xxman(*)]
Notes: Instrumental leaked by KTT user xxman on July 11, 2013; finished version of the "God Level" beat. Unconfirmed as it's a strange case; xxman did the production himself, but he is known to have worked with Travis. xxman claimed that both L$ and Travis himself confirmed that it's real, but the proof is lost. Pharaohxx also supposedly said that it was real, but this is according to Carlos who was quoting an email from him.
